MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patrick Heard. There being no appearance by either party or their counsel, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.
